debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
f : U → V
⊢ range f = Ran (graph f)

proof:
by
  ext v
  constructor <;> simp [range, Ran, graph]
failed_attempts:
by
  ext v
  constructor <;> simp [range, Ran, graph, Function.mem_range]
  <;> aesop

by
  ext y
  constructor <;> intro h
  · obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := h
    exact ⟨x, f x, rfl, rfl⟩
  · obtain ⟨x, z, hxz, hyz⟩ := h
    rw [← hyz]
    exact ⟨x, hxz⟩

by
  ext v
  constructor <;> intro h
  · obtain ⟨u, rfl⟩ := h
    exact ⟨u, f u, rfl, rfl⟩
  · obtain ⟨u, w, hu, hv⟩ := h
    rw [←hv]
    exact ⟨u, hu⟩

by
  ext v
  constructor <;> simp [range, Ran, graph, Function.funext_iff]
  <;> aesop
